title: 'Amr b. al-'A§ and Khalid b. al-Walid Go to Medina as Muslims
description: as Muslims In this year 'Amr b. al-'A^ came to the Messenger of God as a Muslim, having accepted Islam at the court of the Negus. With him came 'Uthman b. Talbah al-'Abdari and Khalid b. al-Walid b. al-Mughirah. They came to Medina at the beginning of $afar.609 According to Abu Ja'far [al-Tabari]: The circumstances of 'Amr b. al-'Ag's becoming a Muslim were as follows (according to Ibn Humayd-Salamah-Ibn Isliaq-Yazid b. Abi Habib-Rashid,

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 08
